nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: Margory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Margory Wallace was born about 1400, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. She married Thomas Rowland in 1417, in Craigie, East Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Margory Wallaceは約1400年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで生まれた。1417年にイギリススコットランドエアスト エイルシュアイアクレイジでThomas Rowlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margory Wallace(은)는 대략 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 에이르실르 크레이기에서 Thomas Rowland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margory Wallace родилась около 1400 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Rowland в 1417 г. в местности креиги, эаст аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
